cmd:
cd /app/app && go build -o /app/server . 2>&1 && cd /app && PORT=8081 ./server &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2
curl -s http://localhost:8081/v1/users/usr-001 | jq .
curl -s http://localhost:8081/v2/users/usr-001 | jq .
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
